valid_states.NO_BOOT: Manifest missing, invalid, or ontological root unresolved.
valid_states.NO_FULL_BOOT: Ontological root verified, but required sibling component missing.
valid_states.NO_OPERATIVE_MODE: Assembly structurally complete, but empirical safety unlock is false.
valid_states.FULL_BOOT: Assembly structurally complete and empirical safety unlock is true.
